question.question: How to install Guardium on Windows?

response.answer_markdown:
### Installing Guardium on Windows

To install Guardium on Windows, you need to follow the procedure for installing the S-TAP agent using the interactive installer [S1]. This involves logging on to the database server with a system administrator account and running the Guardium Windows S-TAP Install Wizard with administrative privileges [S1]. You will then need to read and accept the license agreement, provide customer information, and select an installation type (Typical, Compact, or Custom) [S1]. 

During the installation, you will need to provide the IP address or host name of the Guardium system that will receive data from the S-TAP [S2]. You can also change some Windows S-TAP parameters from the interactive installer, but not all [S2]. After installation, you can verify that the S-TAP is communicating with the Guardium system by browsing to Manage > Activity Monitoring > S-TAP Control and reviewing the S-TAP's status and configuration [S5].

Before beginning the installation, make sure to review the Windows S-TAP installation requirements, verify that your database server and operating system are supported, and obtain the S-TAP module from either Fix Central or your Guardium representative [S4].

### What this does not establish

This does not establish the specific system requirements or the Windows S-TAP monitoring mechanisms support matrix, as this information is referenced but not provided in the given evidence [S4]. Additionally, the evidence does not provide information on how to install Guardium itself, but rather the S-TAP agent, which is a component of Guardium [S1][S2][S3][S4][S5][S6].

### Sources
[S1] Windows: Installing S-TAP agent by using the interactive installer — IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.x [live IBM Docs] 
[S2] Windows: Installing S-TAP agent by using the interactive installer — IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.x [live IBM Docs] 
[S3] Windows: Installing S-TAP agent by using the interactive installer — IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.x [live IBM Docs] 
[S4] Windows: Installing S-TAP agent by using the interactive installer — IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.x [live IBM Docs] 
[S5] Windows: Installing S-TAP agent by using the interactive installer — IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.x [live IBM Docs] 
[S6] Windows: Installing S-TAP agent by using the interactive installer — IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.x [live IBM Docs]
